sourcePriority: canonical data and current design records
legacy art as identity reference only

fighter.faceLanguage: square, sturdy, determined, warm tan skin
fighter.hair: dark-brown upward spikes with short crimson headband
fighter.costumeSilhouette: broad shoulders, sleeveless novice armor, huge paired forearm mass
fighter.materialLanguage: worn iron, practical leather, rough cloth

swordman.hair: chestnut swept hair with prominent side lock
swordman.secondaryColor: silver steel and dark navy leather
swordman.costumeSilhouette: slim layered novice armor, light shoulders, compact buckler
swordman.materialLanguage: clean steel, fitted leather, short cloth scarf
swordman.weapon: slender straight longsword with small blue buckler
forbiddenOverlap: Knight heavy plate or tower shield

archer.faceLanguage: exact approved Archer identity; not reused by other classes
archer.costumeSilhouette: hood, cape, quiver and ornate bow
archer.materialLanguage: soft green leather/cloth with ornate gold trim
archer.personality: cute, alert and battle-ready ranged hero
forbiddenOverlap: all Archer-specific face, hood, ears, palette and bow cues are reserved

mage.hair: short tousled black hair beneath asymmetric pointed cap
mage.costumeSilhouette: tall pointed cap, triangular robe and short mantle
mage.materialLanguage: soft layered cloth, dark wood and faceted crystal

summoner.faceLanguage: soft angular, reserved, calm teal eyes
summoner.hair: short swept dark-brown hair with turquoise contract band
summoner.secondaryColor: muted indigo, cyan crystal and antique bronze
summoner.costumeSilhouette: high split collar, layered coat, contract tabs and open coat tails
summoner.materialLanguage: soft cloth, embossed grimoire leather, bronze ritual tool
summoner.weapon: contract grimoire plus ring-shaped summoning seal

acolyte.faceLanguage: round, gentle and distinct from Archer; warm amber eyes
acolyte.hair: shoulder-length pale-blonde curls under short ivory veil
acolyte.secondaryColor: pale sky blue and champagne brass
acolyte.costumeSilhouette: short novice veil, A-line tunic, modest shoulder cape
acolyte.materialLanguage: clean soft cloth, simple brass and wood
acolyte.weapon: slim support staff with small open sun ring

merchant.hair: tousled chestnut hair under rust-orange trade cap
merchant.secondaryColor: warm brown, cream, rust orange and muted olive
merchant.costumeSilhouette: padded vest, loaded backpack, belt pouches and rolled map
merchant.materialLanguage: canvas, worn leather, wood and practical iron
merchant.weapon: compact hand axe with ledger and trade satchel
merchant.personality: resourceful traveling trader ready to defend himself

conflictResolutions: Legacy 144x192 procedural sprites and v5 concept bodies differ in detail and polish; hero-codex and the current style-lock remain authoritative, while legacy pixels are identity evidence only.
Mage and Summoner legacy tools overlap. The batch separates Mage through pointed cap plus crystal staff, and Summoner through contract grimoire plus ring seal.
Swordman's legacy shield risks Knight overlap; only a small novice buckler is retained, with a slimmer body and light armor.
Merchant legacy sources vary between briefcase and backpack/axe. The newer detailed travel-merchant cue is used, retaining ledger and trade equipment.
